value="<b>Re-invocation</b><br>the door to the model<br><br>prompts the agent with why control returned (queue empty, prediction miss + diff, level or state change, GAME_OVER, action unavailable) and parses the reply's plan" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="180" x="580" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rpol" parent="runner" style="rounded=1;arcSize=8;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=4 4;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#818CF8;fontColor=#6366F1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;fontFamily=Helvetica parent="rpol" style="rounded=1;arcSize=8;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#C7D2FE;fontColor=#1E293B;fontSize=11;fontFamily=Helvetica Neue;spacing=6;" value="<b>Context resets</b>: past 150k input tokens the conversation is dropped; a fresh session resumes from playbook + log" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="62" width="360" x="10" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2" parent="rpol" style="rounded=1;arcSize=8;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#C7D2FE;fontColor=#1E293B;fontSize=11;fontFamily=Helvetica Neue;spacing=6;" value="<b>Stuck-level </mxCell> <mxCell id="ie1" edge="1" parent="runner" source="rq" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a1" parent="agent" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontFamily=Helvetica Neue;fontColor=#1E293B;spacing=4;" Predicts the outcome of every action it commits. Curates playbook.md for its successors." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="95" width="310" x="10" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a2" parent="agent" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;fontFamily=Helvetica Neue;fontColor=#64748B;spacing=4;" value="never shown images after priming; the log is all </mxCell> <mxCell id="workspace" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=4;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFBEB;strokeColor=#FCD34D;fontColor=#92400E;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontFamily=Helvetica value="<b>arclog.py</b><br><font color="#92400E">bundled helper library</font><br><br><i>import arclog</i> in the python tool: parsed boards as numpy arrays, per-step diffs, connected-component appends every frame to log.txt with a derived [DIFF] line — "[DIFF] none" when nothing changed

div.div:
Re-invocation
the door to the model
prompts the agent with why control returned (queue empty, prediction miss + diff, level or state change, GAME_OVER, action unavailable) and parses the reply's plan
